info.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (CDSE) asset-level STAC catalogue
info.description: A comprehensive and searchable catalog of Earth observation and scientific datasets that is actively maintained and updated by the Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem. The integrated STAC (SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog) API, which follows the open STAC specification, enables users to access detailed asset-level metadata, including spatial information, temporal coverage, and data specifications. This standardized interface facilitates efficient data discovery and retrieval across the extensive collection of environmental and scientific resources. More information: https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/

parameters.name: bbox

schema.description: Only return items intersecting this bounding box. Mutually exclusive with **intersects**.
schema.title: Bbox

parameters.description: Only return items intersecting this bounding box. Mutually exclusive with **intersects**.

parameters.name: intersects

schema.description:
Only return items intersecting this GeoJSON Geometry. Mutually exclusive with **bbox**. 

*Remember to URL encode the GeoJSON geometry when using GET request*.
schema.title: Intersects

parameters.description:
Only return items intersecting this GeoJSON Geometry. Mutually exclusive with **bbox**. 

*Remember to URL encode the GeoJSON geometry when using GET request*.

parameters.name: datetime

schema.description:
Only return items that have a temporal property that intersects this value.

Either a date-time or an interval, open or closed. Date and time expressions adhere to RFC 3339. Open intervals are expressed using double-dots.
schema.title: Datetime

parameters.description:
Only return items that have a temporal property that intersects this value.

Either a date-time or an interval, open or closed. Date and time expressions adhere to RFC 3339. Open intervals are expressed using double-dots.

schema.description: Limits the number of results that are included in each page of the response (capped to 10_000).

parameters.description: Limits the number of results that are included in each page of the response (capped to 10_000).

ItemCollection-Input.title: ItemCollection
ItemCollection-Input.description:
This is a less strict implementation of ItemCollection.
It only implements the FeatureCollection Specs
not enforcing required links as specified in STAC-API-FEATURES specs.
Use `stac_pydantic.api.ItemCollection` to enforce link relationships and extra fields.

Operator.title: Operator
Operator.description: Defines the set of operators supported by the API.

PostFieldsExtension.title: PostFieldsExtension
PostFieldsExtension.description:
FieldsExtension.

Attributes:
    include: set of fields to include.
    exclude: set of fields to exclude.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Limits the number of results that are included in each page of the response (capped to 10_000).

sortby.title: Sortby
sortby.description: An array of property (field) names, and direction in form of '{'field': '<property_name>', 'direction':'<direction>'}'

fields.description: Include or exclude fields from items body.

filter.description: A CQL filter expression for filtering items.

filter-crs.title: Filter-Crs
filter-crs.description: The coordinate reference system (CRS) used by spatial literals in the 'filter' value. Default is `http://www.opengis.net/def/crs/OGC/1.3/CRS84`

filter-lang.title: Filter-Lang
filter-lang.description: The CQL filter encoding that the 'filter' value uses.
